title: Creamy Australian Fish Stock Soup
description: A herbal and creamy soup featuring fish stock with a touch of nut-free-friendly herbs to help cure hangovers.

ingredients.name: Fish Stock
ingredients.notes: Ensure it is shelf-stable and ready-to-use

ingredients.name: Butternut Squash
ingredients.notes: Peel, seed, and dice into chunks

ingredients.name: Thyme Sprigs
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried, optional for flavoring

ingredients.name: Worcestershire Sauce
ingredients.notes: Use to add depth and umami

ingredients.name: Cream (Nut-Free Option)
ingredients.notes: Replace with coconut cream or almond milk if needed

instructions: Heat a pot over medium heat and add the fish stock. Bring to a simmer.
Add finely chopped leeks, diced butternut squash, thyme sprigs, and onion to the pot. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Simmer for about 20 minutes until all vegetables are tender. Remove from heat and discard thyme sprigs if using.
Stir in Worcestershire sauce and then add the cream (nut-free option). Stir well to combine ingredients.
Allow the soup to come back to a gentle simmer. Let it cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
Ladle into bowls and serve hot.
